# Arcane Hive

> Dhaka-based technology company delivering Software, IoT, and AI development with a singular focus: operational efficiency and measurable ROI for Bangladesh's established businesses and international partners. Founded 2017. Twelve projects delivered and actively maintained. We don't just build tech, we protect your profit.

## Services
- [Software Development](https://arcane-hive.com/services/software-development/): custom retail and e-commerce platforms, inventory and logistics systems, web apps and internal tools, all engineered to international standards for Bangladeshi businesses.
- [IoT Solutions](https://arcane-hive.com/services/iot-solutions/): smart monitoring for warehouses and factories, theft prevention, energy optimization, and locally researched custom IoT devices.
- [AI Integration](https://arcane-hive.com/services/ai-integration/): call-center automation, AI-enabled CRM, conversational assistants, and AI that plugs into your existing stack to cut response times and overhead.
- Digital AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract): ongoing software management, security patching, and performance upkeep so platforms keep earning their place after launch.

## How we work — The Arcane Standard
Every engagement starts from your business outcome and works backward to the right architecture; we build to international quality standards chosen for your problem; solutions are tuned to Bangladeshi operations and user behavior from day one; and our Digital AMC keeps what we ship secure, updated, and fast for the long term.

- [Home](https://arcane-hive.com/): company overview, the Arcane Standard, delivered portfolio, leadership
- [Services](https://arcane-hive.com/services/): hub for software, IoT, and AI development services
- [Projects](https://arcane-hive.com/projects/): full delivered portfolio across web platforms, IoT devices, mobility solutions, and business solutions
- [Blog / Insights](https://arcane-hive.com/blog/): practical articles on software, IoT, and AI for businesses in Bangladesh
  - [How to choose a software development company in Bangladesh](https://arcane-hive.com/blog/choosing-software-development-company-bangladesh/)
  - [How IoT monitoring cuts warehouse theft and loss in Bangladesh](https://arcane-hive.com/blog/iot-monitoring-warehouse-theft-bangladesh/)
- [Team](https://arcane-hive.com/team/): leadership and team profiles

## Selected delivered work
- Web platforms: Fanmire.com (international), Bongshal.com (Bangladesh automotive-parts marketplace, built and actively maintained by Arcane Hive), Zabai.no (Europe)
- IoT devices: AI-Integrated Juice Cart (WellSpring, a Bangladesh first), Spice Sun-Drying Machine (iFarmer/BARI/Department of Agricultural Marketing, a Bangladesh first), AI Desk Assistant
- Mobility: EV Ride-Sharing App (Jaiben), EV Battery-Swap Conversion, EV Delivery Van R&D (Daraz/DigiBox)
- Business: Kiosk & POS Software, AI-Enabled CRM, Handheld Payment Solutions

## Facts
- Founded: 2017
- Headquarters: Dhaka, Bangladesh
- Projects delivered and maintained: 12
- Areas served: Bangladesh and international partners (Europe, Norway)
